title: Lazy Sunday Kenyan Banana Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Kenyan-inspired banana stir fry perfect for a lazy Sunday morning. This dish combines the natural sweetness of bananas with a hint of citrusy flavor.

ingredients.name: Banana
ingredients.notes: Ripe bananas work best for this recipe

ingredients.name: Citrusy Orange Juice
ingredients.notes: Add a squeeze of fresh orange juice for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Tender Spinach
ingredients.notes: Fresh spinach adds a nutritious twist to this stir fry

ingredients.name: Lazy Sunday Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: A pre-mixed blend of spices for convenience

ingredients.name: Kenyan Coconut Oil
ingredients.notes: Use coconut oil for a tropical flavor

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add spinach and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Add sliced bananas and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Pour in orange juice and stir to combine.
Sprinkle Lazy Sunday Spice Blend over the top and stir to coat.
Cook for an additional minute, until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh spinach if desired.
